image_resolution.source: RPD paper §IV.A: 'All demonstrations were rendered with the human camera at an image resolution of 256×256'

max_episode_steps.source: RPD paper §IV.A right column p.4: 'increasing the maximum episode length to 300 steps led to considerably higher success rates'

prompt_format.value: In: What action should the robot take to {instruction.lower()}?\nOut:

image_flip_180deg.source: vlagents has no flip on the ManiSkill render path; only our LIBERO/RoboCasa default added one

image_resize_before_model.source: vlagents/src/vlagents/policies.py:435 — passes 256×256 directly to HF processor; processor handles internal 224 resize

center_crop.source: vlagents/src/vlagents/policies.py:435 self.processor(prompt, Image.fromarray(image)) — no center_crop kwarg; Juelg finetune was trained without center-crop aug

gripper_post_processing.value: a[-1] = a[-1] * 2 - 1.0  # rescale [0,1]→[-1,1] only; NO sign-binarize, NO invert

invert_gripper.source: vlagents gripper post-proc rescales [0,1]→[-1,1] only; no sign invert. Omitting --no_invert_gripper regresses PullCube 80%→50% (115588 vs 115662)

wait_steps.source: vlagents/src/vlagents/evaluator_envs.py has no warmup loop before VLA inference; however our eval uses 10 steps for init-pose alignment and removing it regressed PullCube 40→0%

obs_wrapper.source: OpenVLA processor consumes flat dict; no EnvTransition

train_seed_range.source: RPD paper §IV.A: ManiSkill PPO training samples reset seeds from a wide range; treat as superset of eval (no fixed seed reservation).

eval_seed_range.source: ManiSkill harness uses episode-index seeding starting at 0 (aligned with training distribution); num_trials=50.
